title: lappa personata
intro: Lappa personata, also known as Fleabane, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and insect bites. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Lappa personata can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
